Quest for Glory I EGA - Fully Voiced
====================================

An AI voice-over pack for Quest for Glory I: So You Want To Be A Hero (EGA).
Every character and every line is voiced. Runs on a bundled build of ScummVM,
so you do not need to install anything else.

You must own Quest for Glory I. This pack does NOT include the game itself.


HOW TO USE (3 steps)
--------------------
1. Unzip this folder anywhere you like.

2. Copy your Quest for Glory 1 EGA game files into the "game" folder next to
   the launcher.
      - Steam: ...\steamapps\common\Quest for Glory Collection\QG1\EGA
      - GOG:   the QG1 EGA folder in your GOG install
   (You want the folder that contains RESOURCE.MAP and RESOURCE.000-004.)

3. Run the launcher:
      - Windows:  double-click  "Play QFG1 (Voiced).bat"
      - macOS:    double-click  "Play QFG1 (Voiced).command"
      - Linux:    run           ./play-qfg1-voiced.sh

   Pick 1 to play. That's it, the game starts fully voiced.


CHANGING GRAPHICS AND SOUND (optional)
--------------------------------------
Pick 2 in the launcher menu to open ScummVM's own settings first. There you can
turn on a smoothing filter (HQ3x and friends), pick a different music device
such as MT-32 or FluidSynth, resize the window, and so on. Your choices are
saved next to the launcher in scummvm.ini, so they stick for next time and they
do not touch any other ScummVM install you may already have.

The launcher menu was suggested by a player on Nexus Mods. Thank you.


FIRST-LAUNCH SECURITY PROMPT
----------------------------
This build is not code-signed, so your OS may warn once:
  - Windows: "Windows protected your PC" -> More info -> Run anyway
  - macOS:   right-click the launcher -> Open -> Open
  - Linux:   no prompt
This is normal for fan-made tools.


NOTES
-----
- Voices play automatically as text appears. To hear the original music, leave
  sound on; the voice-overs sit on top of the game.
- This is an unofficial fan project. Quest for Glory is the property of its
  rights holders. Non-commercial.
